data.title: Gate.io Launchpool Launches $1 Million Airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io Launchpool has launched a limited-time million-dollar airdrop event. Users only need to stake 0.00003 ETH to participate in the airdrop rewards with a total value of up to 1 million US dollars. This event includes multiple potential mining projects. The airdrop rewards are automatically issued every hour. Staking ETH can earn high returns with an ultra-low threshold.

data.title: CZ Unveils Crypto Portfolio via Binance Square’s Trader Profile: 98.48% in BNB
data.description: Binance Square is enhancing transparency with its latest feature, Trader Profile, enabling users to publicly share their crypto portfolio allocation. Binance co-founder and former CEO Changpeng "CZ" Zhao has opened his Trader Profile, showcasing his holdings and reinforcing his confidence in Binance’s ecosystem.According to his Binance Square Trader Profile, CZ's portfolio is overwhelmingly 98.48% in BNB, with smaller allocations of 1.32% in Bitcoin (BTC), 0.17% in EURI, and just 0.03% in USDT ﻿

data.title: Microstrategy Increases Bitcoin Holdings With Significant Purchase
data.description: According to Foresight News, MicroStrategy has expanded its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 20,356 bitcoins at an average price of $97,514 each. This move underscores the company's ongoing commitment to investing in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Strategy currently holds a total of 499,096 BTC, with an average cost of $66,357
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens statistics, Strategy currently holds 499,096 BTC, with a total purchase value of approximately US$33.1 billion and an average cost of US$66,357. Earlier news, Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) increased its holdings of 20,356 bitcoins at an average price of US$97,514.

data.title: Strategy increased its holdings by 20,356 Bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) increased its holdings of 20,356 bitcoins at an average price of US$97,514.

data.title: Binance Futures will update leverage and margin tiers for TRUMP, TON and other U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Contracts will update the leverage and margin levels of TRUMPUSDT, TONUSDT, POPCATUSDT and MOODENGUSDT U-based perpetual contracts at 22:00 on February 24, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8).

data.title: SEC Ends Investigation into Robinhood Crypto
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Aggr News, the SEC has terminated its investigation into ROBINHOOD Crypto and will not take any action.

data.title: Strategy Completes $2 Billion Convertible Note Offering
data.description: According to Odaily, Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, has successfully completed a $2 billion convertible note offering. Founder Michael Saylor announced on the X platform that the notes carry a 0% coupon rate and a 35% premium, with an implied conversion price of approximately $433.43.

data.title: Strategy Completes $2 Billion Convertible Note Offering
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor announced on the X platform that Strategy has successfully completed the issuance of $2 billion in convertible notes. The notes carry a 0% coupon rate and a 35% premium, with an implied conversion price of approximately $433.43.

data.title: ZachXBT: Bybit, Poloniex, Phemex, and BingX hacks linked to the same entity
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain detective ZachXBT posted on the X platform that today, when laundering money for the Bybit hacking incident, the Poloniex hacking attack was also linked on the chain in the form of a merged address 0x15ec. Now, this shows that the same entity is associated with four different hacking attacks (Bybit, Poloniex, Phemex, BingX).
